attributes.description: Alerts when average outstanding requests exceed 10. Processing saturation on ZooKeeper.
attributes.name: [ZooKeeper OTel] Outstanding requests saturation

investigation_guide.blob:
## ZooKeeper outstanding requests saturation

### What fired
Average `zookeeper.request.active > 10` during the window.

### Why it matters
A healthy ZK has near-zero outstanding requests. Sustained values signal saturation — client timeouts follow.

### Triage
1. Check disk fsync latency.
2. Inspect CPU / GC pauses.

### Remediation
- Move ZK to faster storage or less-contended hosts.

### Tuning
- 10 threshold; lower for stricter monitoring.
